content.description:
Field editor for numeric values using HTML number input. Used by [generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) for fields with `editor: 'number'`.

## Options

- `min`: Minimum allowed value
- `max`: Maximum allowed value
- `step`: Increment step (e.g., `0.1` for decimals)
- `readonly`: Makes input non-editable

## Value Handling

Empty input returns `null`, otherwise returns parsed `Number`.
